title: task
description: compact_cot.py:807-818 - _parse_xml_chat only recognizes team destinations by matching chatroom name against team names. Direct messages have chatroom set to a hex UID (e.g., 'aabbccdd00112233') which doesn't match any team, so dest_type defaults to BROADCAST. This silently corrupts direct message routing - the recipient UID is lost entirely. Failure scenario: ATAK user sends direct message to specific user -> gateway compresses to XML -> parses back -> message becomes broadcast to all users instead of private.
close_reason: Fixed: Added direct message detection to _parse_xml_chat() in compact_cot.py - 16-char hex chatroom values are now recognized as IIDs and routed as DIRECT messages instead of defaulting to BROADCAST. Added tests for direct and team message parsing.
